form.formComment: Flew the lids with a quick early split but had to settle for the minor money when third (30.40) over 525m at The Meadows. Unbeaten in three starts from this draw. Key runner.

form.formComment: In the money last time at Warragul (26.05) in a Mix 3/4, finishing a 8 length third. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and four places from eight starts. Leading chance.

form.formComment: Was a little disappointing last start, fading in the run home at this track over 435m. The start prior was at his best with a 4 length win over 435m at this track. Others hold stronger claims.
